name: Pasta with Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup white wine or chicken broth
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut the broccoli into bite-sized pieces.
2. Cook the broccoli in salted water until tender-crisp.
3. Drain well and set aside.
4. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add olive oil.
5. Sauté onion until translucent.
6. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
7. Stir in broccoli, white wine or broth, and simmer for 3 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta with the broccoli mixture.
10. Toss well to ensure even coating.
11. Serve immediately with grated cheese on top.
